subject: Re: referenced frame series could not be found
body:
Hi Pankaj,

Do the file names in your mdoc files match the file names in your frame
series data folder?

Alister

On Tue, 11 Jun 2024 at 16:07, Pankaj Vilas Jadhav <pvjadhav@umich.edu>
wrote:

> Hi all,
> I am using warp2.0, i am getting the following error while trying to
> import titseires to get the .tomostar file:
>
> Failed to parse TS_001.mrc.mdoc: At least one of the referenced frame
> series could not be found:
>
> Any suggestions what must be going wrong?
>
> Pankaj
>
> --
